meta.series: 射鵰英雄傳 (Legend of the Condor Heroes) 1983 TVB
notes: Opening and ending themes are consistent across all episodes in a season.
Timings vary slightly per episode due to cold-open length.
The preprocessor should strip these segments from yue before alignment.
Signature phrases for detection are in the 'detection' field.

opening.title: 一生有意義
opening.artist: 羅文 (Roman Tam) & 甄妮 (Jenny Tseng)
opening.usage: Opening theme for Part 2 (東邪西毒), episodes 20-39

typical_timing.notes: Starts after cold-open recap. Ep21: 22.5-73.6s, Ep22: 22.9-73.8s, Ep23: 24.6-73.6s, Ep24: 23.8-65.1s

official_lyrics.format: duet (女=female/甄妮, 男=male/羅文, 合=both)

lines.cjk: 人海之中 找到了你
lines.en: In the sea of people, I found you
and everything became filled with meaning

lines.cjk: 從今心中 就找到了美
lines.en: From now on, my heart has found beauty
found where devoted love can rest

lines.cjk: 人生匆匆 心裡有愛
lines.en: Life rushes by, but with love in the heart
a lifetime gains its meaning
Ah, this life has purpose
Across ten thousand rivers and mountains, there is someone
to walk hand in hand with, to lean on
Ah, to lean on each other
Of one voice
of one heart
of one spirit
of one mind
no division between us
spending all our love and devotion
with you, through life and death, inseparable

lines.cjk: 情癡心癡 真意愛意
lines.en: Love-struck, heart-struck, true feeling, deep love
in this life, never to change
Ah, a true heart never wavers
Together through mountains of blades, we will not flinch
with the valour of heroes
Ah, showing righteousness
The eagle-shooting hero's spirit, forever in history
with the valour of heroes
Ah, showing righteousness

whisper_asr_samples.ep21: 人海之中 找到了你 一切變了有情意 從今心中 就找到了美 找到了自我所依 人生匆匆 心裏有愛 一世有了緣 萬水千山 此生有人 相陪又相認 同生心安慰 無罷無共彼此 用盡我 與我痴 與你生死相悲 情痴心痴 真意愛意 此世也永無意
whisper_asr_samples.ep22: 人海之中 找到了你 一切變了有情意 從今心中 就找到了美 找到了似岸所以 人心匆匆 心裏有愛 一世有了願意 萬水千山 此生有人 相配又相依 同聲 同心 同力 無罷 無分彼此 用盡我 與我似 與你生死相
whisper_asr_samples.ep23: 就找到了你 一切變了有情意 從今心中 就找到了美 找到了似我所依 人生匆匆 心裡有愛 一切又了如意 萬水千山 此生有人 相愛又相依 同聲心暗棄 無法互奉彼此 用盡我 與我癡 與你生死相
whisper_asr_samples.ep24: 我從人海之中 找到了你 一切變了有情意 從今心中 就找到了美 找到了自我所依 人生匆匆 心裏有愛 一世有了緣 萬水千山 此生有人 相愧有相依 同聲夢心夢起 無霸舞風起似 用盡我
whisper_asr_samples.notes: Whisper consistently garbles: 癡愛所依→自我所依/似岸所以; 一世有了意義→一世有了緣/願意; 相攜又相倚→相陪又相認/相配又相依; 同聲同心同氣同意→various garbles. The core melody words (人海之中, 找到了你, 萬水千山, 生死相依) are reliably transcribed.

ending.title: 肯去承擔愛
ending.usage: Ending theme / insert song for Part 2 (東邪西毒), episodes 20-39

typical_timing.notes: Relative to episode end. Ep21: 2536-2569s, Ep22: 2531-2579s, Ep23: 2475-2531s, Ep24: 2350-2371s. Sometimes overlaps with final dialogue.

detection.notes: Often plays over final scene dialogue, so Whisper mixes lyrics with dialogue. The opening theme (一生有意義) also replays as a reprise over end credits in some episodes.

lines.en: I've long known that my love for him
should never have begun
Yet I would trade my whole life
for one moment of his true affection
I would rather cast away my life
than ever change this devoted heart
For him, I willingly endure
all the sorrows of this world
This deep love in my heart
nothing can replace
Willing to bear love's suffering
daring to face the future
I would rather change my fate
than change this devoted heart

whisper_asr_samples.ep24: 若願將一世交換 怕一次爭議對到 我是寧可拋去生命 此生決不圓破 為了他 甘心去忍受 齊備我 在我心中 這份濃情沒有東西能度 肯去承擔愛的苦痛
whisper_asr_samples.notes: Heavy garbling: 我卻願→若願; 他一次真意對待→怕一次爭議對到; 癡心決不願改→此生決不圓破. Core phrases (肯去承擔愛, 寧可拋去生命, 甘心去忍受, 濃情沒有東西能代) are roughly recognisable.

opening_reprise.notes: 一生有意義 often replays instrumentally or as a brief vocal reprise over end credits. Whisper picks this up in the last segment of most episodes. The detection signatures overlap with the opening. When detected in the last 120s, treat as end-credits reprise, not a separate song.

whisper_asr_samples.ep21: 人海之中 找到了你 一切變了有情意 從今心中 就找到了美 找到了自我所依 人生匆匆 心裏有愛 一世有療癒 萬水千山 此生有人 相陪又相依
whisper_asr_samples.ep22: 人海之中 找到了你 一切變了有情意 從今心中 就找到了美 找到了自我所依 人生匆匆 心裏有愛 一世有了緣 萬水千山 此生有人 相愧又相依
